sections.label: Chorus
lines: Phat ve un! Phat ve un! Leitung teng kizel hen!
Phat ve un! Phat ve un!
Jesuh’ min suangin a Pa kiang va zuan un;
A bawlsa na lianpi hangin phat ciat

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A si in hong leizo, tatna kicing khin,
A umte a dingin, Pasian in ciam khin;
nangawn in Jesuh a up leh,
A mawhna mai ding hi, a up khit phet teh.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na lianpi hong bawlsak in, ei hong hilh a,
Tapa Jesuh hangin, i lungdam lua ta;
muh ciangin nuam zaw lai ding hi.
Sangzaw, siangzaw, lianzaw, lungdamzaw ding hi
